---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Prouvost Dimitri"
---

::: {.hero}
**MSc Finance · HEC Lausanne · Asset & Risk Management**

Based near Geneva · Available for an internship from January 2027

## About

Welcome. I'm an MSc Finance student at HEC Lausanne, focused on Asset & Risk Management. This page offers a preview of my work, which explores how macroeconomic forces drive financial markets. Feel free to explore.

---

## Research projects

<div class="project-card">

### Oil Shocks & Global Equity Markets

*Regime-dependent OLS, VAR, and IRF analysis on global equity returns (1990–2026)*

A 9,400-observation empirical study investigating whether oil price shocks have stronger negative effects on equity returns during economic downturns, and whether developed and emerging markets respond differently. Implemented Newey-West HAC inference, three VAR systems with bootstrapped impulse responses, and forecasting against Welch & Goyal (2008) benchmark.

**Tech**: Python (statsmodels, NumPy, Pandas) · *MSc Finance, HEC Lausanne · 2026*

[→ View project site](https://dimitripr.github.io/oil-shocks-equity-markets/) · [→ Source code](https://github.com/DimitriPr/oil-shocks-equity-markets)

</div>

---



## CV

For my detailed CV, please reach out by email, I share it directly with recruiters and contacts who are interested.

<div class="cv-actions">
<a href="mailto:prouvostdimitri@gmail.com?subject=CV%20request%20-%20Dimitri%20Prouvost&body=Hi%20Dimitri%2C%0A%0AI%20would%20like%20to%20get%20a%20copy%20of%20your%20CV.%0A%0ABest%20regards%2C" class="btn-download">✉ Request CV via email</a>
</div>

---


## Contact

- **Email** — [prouvostdimitri@gmail.com](mailto:prouvostdimitri@gmail.com)
- **GitHub** — [@DimitriPr](https://github.com/DimitriPr)
